subject: WM-0074 ready for review
body: Repaired WM-0074 review findings: borrowed-shadow roster rows now require exact reviewed M4 schema, threshold, masks, component, policy and owner-kind basis; duplicate defIds across all roster rows are rejected; added regressions for tampered borrowed-shadow rows and duplicate future defs. Required checks and pnpm quality pass; M4 vertical-slice hashes preserved.
